message.content:
🗳️  **WAVE COMMUNITY GOVERNANCE VOTING**

📝 **SUBMIT FOR FREE**
└─ Post your map submission in <#1508030522746605690>
   • **1 submission** per person each week
   • Submissions **cannot be changed** once posted

🗺️ **YOUR VOTE MATTERS**
└─ Vote in <#1508289287169511496> for the drop maps you want made
   • **2 votes** per person each week

🏆 **MOST VOTES WIN**
└─ The map with the **highest votes** in <#1508289287169511496> wins
   • Selected map gets added to <#1210837116649742396>
   • **Made for FREE for anyone that voted for that map** 🚀

Please be patient to get your role as we **might be asleep or afk you will get your role just wait.**

-  <a:VERIFY:1154289883255423036>  **Use code wavedropmaps in the item shop EVERY 2 weeks to keep ACCESS for the loot routes + tips and tricks. **

message.content:
__Invites not counting?__

**On desktop**
- 📋   Press server title  ➜ Invite People ➜ Press "Copy Link"  :right_arrow:   Invite your friends! 
**On mobile**
- 📋  Press a channel  ➜  Then the name ➜ Press "invite members" ➜ Press Copy link :right_arrow:  Invite your friends!
